text:
1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to recall the word blue from the previous repetition of words question. 2 = Yes, no cue required 
1 = Yes, after cueing ("a color") 
0 = No - could not recall 
- = Not Assessed/No Information 
^ = Blank
466 RCLL_3RD_WORD_DSCHRG_CD RCLL_3RD_WORD_DSCHRG_CD BIMS - Recalls Bed (Dsch) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was able to recall the word bed from the previous repetition
